title: Task 5: Dual-write in createAstroImage + getImageBySource()
Task 4: withSourceDefaults() pure helper (TDD)
Task 3: PostgreSQL migration ALTER + backfill
Task 2: SQLite migration 0010 + journal entry
design:
Files:
- Create: tools/migrations/sqlite/0010_add_source_columns.sql
- Modify: tools/migrations/sqlite/meta/_journal.json (append entry idx 10)

Pattern: follow hand-written migrations 0008/0009 (no snapshot file needed — the better-sqlite3 runtime migrator at apps/server/src/db.ts:56 reads _journal.json + the .sql files only; 0009 already ships without a snapshot). SQLite ADD COLUMN with NOT NULL requires a DEFAULT (we have one).

- [ ] Step 1: Create tools/migrations/sqlite/0010_add_source_columns.sql with exactly:

ALTER TABLE `astrophotography_images` ADD COLUMN `source_type` text DEFAULT 'immich' NOT NULL;--> statement-breakpoint
ALTER TABLE `astrophotography_images` ADD COLUMN `source_id` text;--> statement-breakpoint
UPDATE `astrophotography_images` SET `source_id` = `immich_id` WHERE `source_id` IS NULL AND `immich_id` IS NOT NULL;

- [ ] Step 2: Append to the "entries" array in tools/migrations/sqlite/meta/_journal.json, after the 0009 object:

    {
      "idx": 10,
      "version": "6",
      "when": 1748736000000,
      "tag": "0010_add_source_columns",
      "breakpoints": true
    }

(Add a comma after the 0009 entry's closing brace.)

- [ ] Step 3: Apply migration against a throwaway SQLite DB to prove it runs and backfills.

Run: rm -f /tmp/sid-mig-test.db && SQLITE_DB_PATH=/tmp/sid-mig-test.db npm run dev:server (let it boot, watch for "Migrations completed successfully", then Ctrl-C)
Alternatively, if a seeded local.db exists, back it up first: cp local.db local.db.bak
Expected: server log prints "Migrations completed successfully" with no migration error.

- [ ] Step 4: Verify columns + backfill on the test DB.

Run: sqlite3 /tmp/sid-mig-test.db "PRAGMA table_info(astrophotography_images);" | grep -E "source_type|source_id"
Expected: two rows — source_type (notnull=1, dflt='immich'), source_id (notnull=0).

- [ ] Step 5: Run type check, then commit.

Run: npm run check  (Expected: PASS)

    git add tools/migrations/sqlite/0010_add_source_columns.sql tools/migrations/sqlite/meta/_journal.json
    git commit -m "feat: add SQLite migration for source_type/source_id"

title: Task 1: Add sourceType/sourceId to Drizzle schemas
design:
Files:
- Modify: packages/shared/src/db/sqlite-schema.ts:7 (after immichId)
- Modify: packages/shared/src/db/pg-schema.ts:9 (after immichId)

Both files carry the header "must stay in sync" — edit BOTH. Types (InsertAstroImage, AstroImage) flow automatically from pg-schema.ts:168/179, so no separate type edits.

- [ ] Step 1: Edit sqlite-schema.ts — insert two lines immediately after `immichId: text('immich_id').unique(),`:

    sourceType: text('source_type').notNull().default('immich'),
    sourceId: text('source_id'),

- [ ] Step 2: Edit pg-schema.ts — insert two lines immediately after `immichId: text('immich_id').unique(),`:

    sourceType: text('source_type').notNull().default('immich'),
    sourceId: text('source_id'),

- [ ] Step 3: Run type check.

Run: npm run check
Expected: PASS (no errors). InsertAstroImage now has optional sourceType/sourceId (default + nullable => optional in insert schema).

- [ ] Step 4: Commit.

    git add packages/shared/src/db/sqlite-schema.ts packages/shared/src/db/pg-schema.ts
    git commit -m "feat: add source_type/source_id columns to image schema"

DRY/YAGNI: do NOT touch packages/shared/src/schemas/schema.ts (unused legacy barrel, no importers).

title: Image source plugin interface
description:
## Summary
Define the plugin contract for how images arrive into the system. Every way of getting images in — local upload, web/URL upload, Immich sync, file system watcher, NINA — is a plugin that writes into local storage (#109).

## Scope

### ImageSource Interface
- `ingest()` — pull/accept images and write to local storage
- `getMetadata()` — extract EXIF/astro metadata from source
- `testConnection()` — validate source is reachable/configured
- Standard lifecycle: register, configure, sync, status

### Source Registry
- Register/discover available source plugins
- Per-source configuration (each plugin owns its config shape)
- Per-source status: last sync, image count, health

### Built-in Sources (v1)
- **Local upload** — direct file upload via API endpoint
- **Web/URL upload** — fetch image from a URL

### Future Sources (not in scope but interface must support)
- Immich sync (#112)
- File system watcher
- NINA integration

### Shared Types
- Types and contracts in `packages/shared`

## Design Notes
- A source's only job is to get image bytes + metadata into local storage
- The rest of the app only reads from local storage — never from a source directly
- Sources run independently (own sync schedules, own config)

## Dependencies
- #109 (local image storage — sources write into this)

title: Make Immich configuration optional (plugin config)
description:
## Parent
Part of #105 — Pivot to standalone astrophotography image platform

## Phase
Phase 3 — Cleanup (2 of 3)

## Summary
Move Immich settings out of the core config into a plugin-scoped config block. The app should be fully functional with zero Immich configuration.

## Scope

### Server Config
- Move the 11 Immich config fields from top-level `AppConfig.immich` into source plugin config
- Each source plugin owns its config shape, stored under `sources.<type>` or similar
- Remove `IMMICH_URL` and `IMMICH_API_KEY` as required env vars
- Remove `IMMICH_MAPPING_PATH` / `LOCAL_MAPPING_PATH` env vars (local storage handles paths now)
- `getImmichConfig()` helper removed from config service

### Admin UI
- `immich-section.tsx`: only shown when Immich source is enabled
- Move Immich settings under a "Sources" or "Integrations" section
- Default state: no sources configured, app works standalone

### System Route
- Remove Immich URL validation from system settings save
- Remove Immich API key redaction logic (handled by plugin)

## Files Affected
- `apps/server/src/services/config.ts` (lines 4-17, 103-115, 155-157)
- `apps/server/src/routes/system.ts` (lines 30-49, 69-71)
- `apps/client/src/components/admin/immich-section.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/pages/admin.tsx`
- `.env.worker.example`, `docker/.env.docker.example`

## Dependencies
- #112 (Immich behind ImageSource)
- #115 (legacy routes removed)

title: Drop Immich legacy code, optional config, and upload UI
description:
## Summary
Remove all direct Immich coupling from the codebase, make Immich config optional, and add the standalone upload experience.

## Scope

### Legacy Removal
- Drop `immich_id` column (migration for SQLite + PostgreSQL)
- Remove `getAstroImageByImmichId()` from storage service
- Remove `/api/immich/*` routes (`apps/server/src/routes/immich.ts`)
- Remove `updateImmichAssetMetadata()` from `apps/server/src/routes/images.ts`
- Clean up migration snapshots

### Config
- Move Immich config fields into plugin-scoped config (source owns its config shape)
- Remove `IMMICH_URL`, `IMMICH_API_KEY`, `IMMICH_MAPPING_PATH`, `LOCAL_MAPPING_PATH` as required env vars
- Remove Immich URL validation from system settings save
- Update `.env.example` files
- Admin UI: Immich section only visible when Immich source is enabled

### Upload UI
- Drag-and-drop / file picker upload component
- Support FITS, XISF, camera RAW, JPEG, PNG, TIFF
- Batch upload with progress
- `POST /api/images/upload` endpoint using local storage
- Admin "Sources" page: list configured sources, status, manual sync trigger

## Prerequisites
All reads/writes must use `source_type/source_id` — no code references `immich_id` directly.

## Dependencies
- #111 (sourceType/sourceId exists)
- #112 (Immich behind ImageSource)

title: Migrate cron sync and websocket events to source abstraction
description:
## Parent
Part of #105 — Pivot to standalone astrophotography image platform

## Phase
Phase 2 — Immich as Plugin (3 of 3)

## Summary
Refactor the cron manager and websocket events to work through the source abstraction rather than directly calling Immich sync.

## Scope
- `cron-manager.ts`: replace `immichSyncService.syncImagesFromImmich()` with source-generic sync
- Each registered source can define its own sync schedule
- WebSocket events: generalize `immich-sync-complete` to `source-sync-complete` with source type payload
- Client `use-socket.ts`: update listener to handle generic sync events

## Files Affected
- `apps/server/src/services/cron-manager.ts` (lines 42-100)
- `apps/client/src/hooks/use-socket.ts` (lines 125-128)

## Dependencies
- #110 (source abstraction interface)
- #112 (Immich behind ImageSource)

title: Migrate asset serving and processing to local storage
description:
## Parent
Part of #105 — Pivot to standalone astrophotography image platform

## Phase
Phase 2 — Immich as Plugin (2 of 3)

## Summary
Replace the Immich proxy asset route with local-first serving. Migrate astrometry and XMP sidecar services to read from local storage instead of Immich.

## Scope

### Asset Serving
- `/api/assets/:assetId/:type` serves from local storage (thumbnails, previews, originals)
- Remove Immich API proxy from the hot path — images are already local after #112
- Fallback to Immich source only during migration period for un-synced images

### Astrometry Service
- `astrometry.ts` currently fetches originals via `GET {immichHost}/api/assets/{immichId}/original`
- Change to read from local file storage

### XMP Sidecar Service
- `xmp-sidecar.ts` uses `config.immichMapping` / `config.localMapping` path translation
- Replace with direct local storage paths

## Files Affected
- `apps/server/src/routes/assets.ts` — rewrite to serve local files
- `apps/server/src/services/astrometry.ts` — remove Immich API calls (lines 50-66, 127)
- `apps/server/src/services/xmp-sidecar.ts` — remove path mapping (lines 191-195, 261-263)

## Dependencies
- #109 (local storage layer)
- #112 (Immich sync copies to local)

title: Refactor Immich to plugin behind source interface
description:
## Summary
Refactor existing Immich sync code into an `ImmichImageSource` plugin that implements the source interface (#117). After this, Immich is just another source — not a runtime dependency.

## Scope

### ImmichImageSource Plugin
- Implements `ImageSource` interface from #117
- `ingest()`: sync from Immich API, download image bytes to local storage (#109)
- `getMetadata()`: extract metadata from Immich asset properties
- `testConnection()`: validate Immich URL + API key
- Owns its config shape (host, apiKey, album selection, sync frequency, metadata sync options)

### Migration
- Existing `immich-sync.ts` internals refactored behind the plugin interface
- Immich sync now **copies images to local storage** rather than proxying on-demand
- Metadata bidirectional sync (description, coordinates, tags) moves into the plugin

### Service Decoupling
- `astrometry.ts`: read originals from local storage, not Immich API
- `xmp-sidecar.ts`: use local paths, not Immich path mappings
- `cron-manager.ts`: sync through source registry, not `immichSyncService` directly
- WebSocket: generalize `immich-sync-complete` to `source-sync-complete`

## Key Behavior Change
Images currently proxied from Immich on every request. After this, Immich sync copies images locally — Immich becomes an import source, not a serving dependency.

## Dependencies
- #109 (local image storage)
- #117 (source plugin interface)
- #111 (sourceType/sourceId columns)

title: Database schema: add sourceType/sourceId columns
description:
## Summary
Add `source_type` and `source_id` columns to `astrophotography_images` alongside the existing `immich_id`. This enables multi-source support without breaking the current Immich flow.

## Scope
- Add `source_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'immich'` and `source_id TEXT` columns (SQLite + PostgreSQL)
- Migration to backfill existing rows: `source_type='immich'`, `source_id=immich_id`
- Dual-write: new image creation populates both `immich_id` and `source_type/source_id`
- Add `getImageBySource(sourceType, sourceId)` query to storage service
- Update shared types to include new fields

## Out of Scope
- Dropping `immich_id` column (Phase 3, after all reads are migrated)
- Changing existing queries that read `immich_id`

## Dependencies
None — additive schema change.

title: Image source abstraction layer (plugin interface)
description:
## Parent
Part of #105 — Pivot to standalone astrophotography image platform

## Phase
Phase 1 — Foundation (2 of 3)

## Summary
Define the `ImageSource` plugin interface that all image sources (local, Immich, future integrations) must implement. This creates the contract that makes Immich just one of many possible sources.

## Scope
- `ImageSource` interface with methods: `ingest()`, `resolve()`, `getMetadata()`, `testConnection()`
- Source registry: register/discover available sources by type
- `LocalImageSource` implementation (wraps #109)
- Types and shared contracts in `packages/shared`

## Design Considerations
- The interface should be generic enough for: direct upload, file system watcher, Immich, NINA, etc.
- Each source owns its own config shape
- Sources are responsible for getting images into local storage — the rest of the app only reads from local

## Out of Scope
- Wrapping existing Immich code behind the interface (Phase 2)
- Database schema changes (separate issue)

## Dependencies
- #109 (local storage layer)

title: Local image storage and serving
description: # Local image storage and serving (issue #109) > **Destination:** this spec body will be pushed to GitHub issue #109 via `gh issue edit 109 --body-file ` once the user accepts the plan. The issue is the living spec per AGENTS.md Phase 1. ## Context Today, every image byte the Sidereal frontend renders is proxied from Immich (`/api/assets/:id/thumbnail` URLs stored directly in `astrophotography_images.thumbnailUrl` / `fullUrl`). This couples the gallery to Immich at runtime: an unreachable or removed Immich means the gallery breaks, and it blocks alternative image sources (#117). The rich astro metadata, equipment links, and acquisition data already live in Sidereal's DB — what's missing is local storage of the bytes themselves. This change makes Sidereal own image bytes end-to-end: store originals + two derived sizes under a configurable `STORAGE_PATH`, serve them from new API routes, and migrate existing rows via a one-shot backfill that pulls from Immich before the Immich coupling is removed from the hot path. ## Scope In scope (per #109): - Local disk storage for originals + preview + thumbnail - API routes to serve those bytes - Schema cleanup so URLs are derived from `id`, not persisted - Backfill of previously-synced Immich rows Out of scope: - Source plugin interface (#117) — landed separately - Upload UI - FITS/XISF conversion - Any image variant beyond the two derived sizes ## Design decisions | # | Decision | Rationale | |---|----------|-----------| | 1 | Store **original + preview (~1920px) + thumbnail (~250px)** per image | App must work without Immich; on-demand derivative generation adds cache logic in the hot path | | 2 | Layout: `/processed////_{original.,preview.jpg,thumb.jpg}` where `/` are the first 4 hex chars of the image id | Sharding caps any single directory at thousands of entries even at 1M+ images; `processed/` prefix leaves room for sibling top-level dirs (e.g. `incoming/` for #117) | | 3 | **Drop `thumbnailUrl` and `fullUrl` columns** from `astrophotography_images`; frontend derives URLs from `id` via an `imageUrl(id, size)` helper | URLs are a serving concern, not persisted state; one helper is cheaper than maintaining duplicated URL strings on every row | | 4 | Migrate existing rows via a **one-shot backfill worker** that fetches from Immich, generates derivatives, updates `originalPath` | Re-syncing destroys user-curated equipment/target links; lazy-on-read carries Immich coupling into the serving hot path forever | | 5 | Image processing via **`sharp`** | libvips-backed, the only realistic choice for multi-hundred-MB astrophoto sources; native prebuilds match our multi-arch Docker build; we already ship `better-sqlite3` so native deps are precedented | | 6 | `STORAGE_PATH` is **env-var only** with sensible defaults (`/app/data/images` in container, `./data/images` locally); not editable in admin UI | A wrong runtime change silently orphans data; storage root belongs in operational config | | 7 | Serve `/api/images/:id/original` with **HTTP range support**; thumbnail & preview as simple full-file responses | Originals are 50–200 MB; range avoids pathological behavior on resume. Derivatives are small enough that range is unnecessary complexity | ## Module boundaries - **`apps/server/src/services/image-storage.ts`** (new) — sole owner of on-disk layout. - `writeImage(id, bytes, ext) → { originalPath }` — atomic tmp+rename for original; sharp pipeline for two derivatives - `readPath(id, size: 'original'|'preview'|'thumbnail') → string` — throws `ImageNotFoundError` if missing - `deleteImage(id) → void` — `rm -rf` per-image dir, idempotent - `imageExists(id, size) → boolean` - Reads `STORAGE_PATH` from `process.env` at module load - **`apps/server/src/routes/images.ts`** — adds three byte-serving handlers - **`apps/server/src/services/immich-sync.ts`** — fetches original from Immich during sync, calls `image-storage.writeImage`, persists local `originalPath`. Drops `thumbnailUrl`/`fullUrl` writes - **`apps/server/src/workers/backfill-images.ts`** (new) — one-shot backfill, auto-enqueued on startup and triggerable from admin UI - **`packages/shared/src/utils/image-urls.ts`** (new) — `imageUrl(id, size)` helper for client Serving routes do not know about Immich. Storage service does not know about routes. Ingest is the only bridge between source and storage. ## Storage service internals **`writeImage(id, bytes, ext)` pipeline:** 1. Compute shard `/` (lowercase hex); `mkdir -p /processed///` 2. Write `_original.` via tmp-file + atomic rename 3. Run sharp twice from the same buffer: `.rotate()` (bake EXIF orientation), `.resize({ fit: 'inside', width/height: 1920|250 })`, `.jpeg({ quality: 85|80, mozjpeg: true })`. Both written tmp+rename 4. Return `{ originalPath }` On failure: best-effort `rm -rf` of per-image dir, rethrow. Caller decides retry vs. fail. **Concurrency:** safe for distinct ids in parallel. Same-id races are prevented at the caller level (backfill claims rows via a status flag). ## Schema changes Migration `0009_local_image_storage.sql` (both sqlite and postgres variants): ```sql ALTER TABLE astrophotography_images DROP COLUMN thumbnail_url; ALTER TABLE astrophotography_images DROP COLUMN full_url; -- original_path stays; semantics shift from "Immich originalPath" -- to "absolute path under STORAGE_PATH/processed/..." ``` Schema files (`packages/shared/src/db/{sqlite,postgres}-schema.ts`): - Remove `thumbnailUrl` / `fullUrl` fields - `originalPath` stays; updated comment Type ripples handled via `npm run check`; the 11 frontend sites identified during exploration (image-gallery, image-modal, targets, sky-map, plate-solving, etc.) switch to `imageUrl(image.id, size)`. ## Serving routes ``` GET /api/images/:id/thumbnail → readPath(id, 'thumbnail') GET /api/images/:id/preview → readPath(id, 'preview') GET /api/images/:id/original → readPath(id, 'original') ``` Common handler: 1. Resolve path; on `ImageNotFoundError` return 404. If a row exists in DB but file is missing, add `X-Sidereal-Backfill: pending` so the UI can render a placeholder during backfill 2. Stat file; set `Content-Type`, `Content-Length`, `Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable`, `ETag: W/"--"`. Honor `If-None-Match` → 304 3. **Original only:** parse `Range:`, support single `bytes=start-end` range; 206 + `Content-Range` on hit, 416 on invalid 4. `Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=""` only when `?download=1` is set 5. Stream via `fs.createReadStream` as Hono response body ## Ingest integration (immich-sync.ts) Currently `immich-sync.ts:328-365` upserts rows with hardcoded Immich proxy URLs. Replace with: 1. Generate the image `id` (UUID) up front 2. Fetch original bytes from Immich (`GET /api/assets/:id/original`, with auth) into a buffer; reject if > 500 MB (configurable) — log and skip rather than OOM 3. Determine extension from `originalFileName` (fallback to mime sniff) 4. `await imageStorage.writeImage(id, buffer, ext)` 5. Insert the row with `originalPath` already populated; drop the URL writes Disk-write failure aborts before any DB insert — no half-state. New Immich client method: `getAssetOriginal(id): Promise<{ bytes: Buffer, filename: string }>`. Existing thumbnail endpoints are no longer called. ## Backfill worker `apps/server/src/workers/backfill-images.ts`: - Query rows where `original_path IS NULL OR original_path NOT LIKE '/processed/%'` - Concurrency pool of 4. For each row: 1. `getAssetOriginal(immichId)` 2. `writeImage(row.id, bytes, ext)` 3. `UPDATE … SET original_path = ? WHERE id = ?` - On failure: log + leave row unchanged; in-memory skip-set after N consecutive failures for the same row - Progress over the existing `ws-manager` → admin UI live count - Triggered: (a) auto-enqueue on server startup if the query has > 0 rows, (b) admin-UI button on the Immich admin page - Idempotent ## Image deletion lifecycle The existing image-delete handler calls `imageStorage.deleteImage(id)` after the row delete commits. A nightly cron sweep in `services/cron-manager.ts` walks `/processed/` and removes per-image dirs whose `id` no longer exists in the DB — defensive cleanup for crashes between row-delete and file-delete. ## Configuration | Variable | Default (container) | Default (local) | Description | |---|---|---|---| | `STORAGE_PATH` | `/app/data/images` | `./data/images` | Root for `processed/` and future top-level dirs | Bind-mount `/app/data` in docker-compose; documented in `.env.example` and AGENTS.md env table. ## Files to modify or create **New:** - `apps/server/src/services/image-storage.ts` - `apps/server/src/services/image-storage.test.ts` - `apps/server/src/workers/backfill-images.ts` - `packages/shared/src/utils/image-urls.ts` - `tools/migrations/sqlite/0009_local_image_storage.sql` - `tools/migrations/postgres/0009_local_image_storage.sql` (if pg migrations are tracked separately) **Modify:** - `apps/server/src/routes/images.ts` — add three byte-serving handlers + helper - `apps/server/src/routes/images.test.ts` (new or extended) — 200 / 304 / 404 / 206 / 416 coverage - `apps/server/src/services/immich-sync.ts` — replace `:328-365` URL-write block with write-to-disk + insert flow; add `getAssetOriginal` to Immich client - `apps/server/src/services/cron-manager.ts` — register nightly orphan sweep - `packages/shared/src/db/sqlite-schema.ts` and `postgres-schema.ts` — drop URL columns; update comment on `originalPath` - `packages/shared/src/types/*` and any Zod schemas — drop URL fields - `apps/client/src/components/image-gallery.tsx`, `components/image-modal.tsx`, `pages/targets.tsx`, `pages/sky-map.tsx`, `pages/plate-solving.tsx` (and 6 other sites surfaced by grep) — swap to `imageUrl(id, size)` - `docker-compose.yml`, `docker-compose.prod.yml` — add `/app/data` bind mount - `.env.example` — add `STORAGE_PATH` - `AGENTS.md` — add `STORAGE_PATH` to env table ## Testing & verification **Unit:** - `image-storage.test.ts` — write→read roundtrip, atomic-rename on simulated failure, shard correctness, EXIF rotation bake-in - `images.routes.test.ts` — 200 / 304 / 404 / 206 / 416 against tmp `STORAGE_PATH` **E2E (Playwright):** extend an existing image-gallery test to assert `` tags load from `/api/images/.../thumbnail` with non-zero responses. **Manual:** 1. `npm run dev`, ingest a small Immich library, confirm files appear under `/processed/`, gallery renders, network panel shows `/api/images/.../thumbnail` 200s with `Cache-Control: immutable` 2. Delete an image via UI → confirm per-image dir is removed 3. Truncate DB but leave files → cron sweep removes orphans on next run 4. Pre-existing DB upgrade → start server, watch backfill worker complete via admin UI, gallery works throughout (placeholder during, real after) 5. Download an original via `?download=1` and confirm range-resume works (e.g. `curl --range 1000000-2000000`) ## Risks - **Disk-full mid-backfill:** writeImage fails atomically; row stays unchanged; next run retries. Admin UI surfaces an error - **Original > 500 MB:** rejected at fetch with logged warning; row keeps Immich path and is idempotently skipped - **STORAGE_PATH changes between boots:** documented as a destructive manual migration (`mv` + restart); no auto-relocation ## Post-approval workflow 1. Push this body to issue #109: `gh issue edit 109 --body-file ` 2. Apply `brainstorming` label: `gh issue edit 109 --add-label brainstorming` 3. Wait for human to apply `implementation-ready` label (per AGENTS.md — agents do not self-promote) 4. On `implementation-ready`: branch `issue-109-local-image-storage`, write a task-level plan to `.agents/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-issue-109-local-image-storage.md`, follow Red-Green-Refactor TDD per AGENTS.md Phase 4

title: Rebrand Skymmich to Sidereal across codebase
description:
## Summary

Rename all references from **Skymmich** to **Sidereal** throughout the codebase — project name, branding, documentation, config, CI/CD, and any user-facing strings. This is a cosmetic/branding change with no logic changes.

## Scope

### Rename everywhere except historical changelog entries
- Package names (`package.json`, `@Skymmich/shared`)
- Docker: service names, container names, volume names, image references, system user, startup script
- CI/CD workflows: image names, artifact names, package names
- Frontend: page title, header, logo alt text, GitHub links
- Backend: log messages, config comments
- Unraid template: name, URLs, paths
- Environment variables (`SKYMMICH_PORT` → `SIDEREAL_PORT`)
- PostgreSQL defaults (DB name, user)
- SQLite default path (`skymmich.db`)
- Documentation and README
- Asset filenames (`skymmich-transparent.png`)

### Out of Scope
- Historical `CHANGELOG.md` entries — leave as-is
- Rewriting git history

### Breaking Changes (must be documented)
The following changes break existing deployments and must be called out in changelog and release notes:
- **Docker volume names**: `skymmich-*` → `sidereal-*` (users must migrate or remap)
- **Environment variables**: `SKYMMICH_PORT` → `SIDEREAL_PORT`
- **PostgreSQL defaults**: DB name/user `skymmich` → `sidereal`
- **Unraid template paths**: `/mnt/user/appdata/skymmich/` → `/mnt/user/appdata/sidereal/`
- **Docker image path**: changes with the new repo/org name
- **Container user**: `skymmich` → `sidereal`

A migration guide should accompany the release.

title: Pivot to standalone astrophotography image platform
description:
## Summary

Sidereal (formerly Skymmich) is shifting from an Immich companion app to a **standalone, self-hosted image platform purpose-built for astrophotography and astronomy imaging**.

## Background

The project was originally conceived as a companion to Immich — extending it with astrophotography-specific features like plate solving, equipment tracking, acquisition logging, and sky map visualization. As a result, the current codebase is tightly coupled to Immich: image synchronization, serving, metadata management, and the plate solving pipeline all depend on the Immich API.

## New Direction

The platform should **own its image pipeline end-to-end** — ingestion, storage, serving, metadata, and processing — without requiring any external service. The focus is on being the best self-hosted solution for managing, organizing, and working with astrophotography and astronomy images.

### Immich as a Plugin

Immich should transition from a required dependency to an **optional plugin integration** — one of potentially many external services that can be connected for syncing or loading images. The plugin architecture should be designed so that other integrations (direct upload, NINA, file system watchers, etc.) are equally viable sources.

### Core Principles

- **Standalone first**: The platform must be fully functional with zero external dependencies beyond its own stack
- **Astro-native**: First-class support for astrophotography formats (FITS, XISF, camera RAW), metadata, and workflows
- **Plugin-extensible**: External integrations (Immich, NINA, etc.) connect through a well-defined plugin/source interface
- **Self-hosted**: Maintains the self-hosted, privacy-respecting ethos

## Scope of Work

This is a foundational architectural shift that touches:

- **Image storage & serving**: Local image management replacing Immich proxy
- **Ingestion pipeline**: Support for direct uploads, file system sources, and plugin-based sources
- **Source abstraction layer**: A plugin interface that Immich (and future integrations) implement
- **Database schema**: Decoupling from `immichId` as the primary image identifier
- **Frontend**: Image display, upload UI, and admin configuration updates
- **Branding**: Remaining Skymmich → Sidereal naming updates throughout the codebase
